name: state-check-contract
description: Defines required state fields per action type. Used by game-state-enforcer hook to validate campaign_state.json writes.

combat_end_required_fields.description: When combat.active changes from true to false, these fields MUST be present/updated

fields.rule: must have entry for each PC in party
must include items from act file loot array

act_transition_required_fields.description: When current_act_id changes, these fields MUST be updated

fields.rule: must summarize what happened in the completed act

spell_usage_required_fields.description: When a caster uses a spell slot, spell_slots_used MUST be updated

fields.rule: keyed by character_id, value is object of level: count_used

quest_update_required_fields.description: When quest-relevant information is discovered or objectives met

fields.rule: must contain quest with updated status

scene_transition_gate.description: Before reading a new act file, campaign_state.json MUST have been written since the last act file was read
scene_transition_gate.rule: game-state-enforcer.py tracks last_act_read_timestamp and last_state_save_timestamp. Blocks Read of act files if state_save < act_read.

periodic_save_gate.description: Force state save every N game actions to prevent gradual drift
periodic_save_gate.rule: game-state-enforcer.py tracks game_actions_since_save. Blocks at limit until campaign_state.json is written.
